ablation_table.caption: Ablation summary in the primary regime: the replay x downscale 2x2 (no_sleep / replay_only / downscale_only / full_dream) as a mean-ACC heatmap, beside per-arm mean ACC. n=8 seeds; bands/error bars = 95% CI (normal approx, mean +/- 1.96*SE over seeds). MOCK-LLM CAVEAT: MECHANISM DEMONSTRATION ONLY. Every number in this analysis was produced in the synthetic fact-world stream under the deterministic mock LLM (no ANTHROPIC_API_KEY on this box), so it is reproducible bit-for-bit. The H1/H0 verdict is therefore a statement about the bench mechanism in this synthetic + mock-LLM regime, NOT a scientific claim about a real Claude model. Neuroscience (sleep, replay, TMR) is motivation and analogy only, never a proof of biological fidelity or real-model efficacy (DX5).

cost_pareto.caption: Accuracy vs compute (total tokens) per arm in the primary regime; the Pareto-non-dominated frontier (max ACC, min tokens) is highlighted. n=8 seeds; bands/error bars = 95% CI (normal approx, mean +/- 1.96*SE over seeds). MOCK-LLM CAVEAT: MECHANISM DEMONSTRATION ONLY. long_context_crossover.caption: Long-context crossover (EC6): acc-per-token (mean ACC / mean tokens, the preregistered metric) for treatment vs baseline across stream length L. no cost-adjusted crossover in the swept range. n=8 seeds; bands/error bars = 95% CI (normal approx, mean +/- 1.96*SE over seeds). sim_vs_real.caption: Sim-vs-real agreement (EC3): per-arm mean ACC on the accelerated high-compression sim stream vs the real low-compression long-horizon stream; annotated with the rank agreement and any inversion. Spearman=1.00, ranking_preserved=True. n=8 seeds; bands/error bars = 95% CI (normal approx, mean +/- 1.96*SE over seeds). MOCK-LLM CAVEAT: MECHANISM DEMONSTRATION ONLY. tmr_targeting.caption: TMR-style targeting: signal-retention lift for replay arms over no-replay arms (a replay-targeting analogue, NOT a literal cued-TMR protocol), vs the Hu et al. 2020 benchmark Hedges' g=0.29. pooled obs: replay=24, no_replay=16; g=1.70. n=8 seeds; bands/error bars = 95% CI (normal approx, mean +/- 1.96*SE over seeds); Hedges' g error bar = bootstrap 95% CI. MOCK-LLM CAVEAT: MECHANISM DEMONSTRATION ONLY.
